path: PNGS/Hassan and Hussain leaders of Paradise and their father is better than them.png
text: Itwas narrated that Ibn ‘Umar said: “The Messenger of Allah saic: ‘IH888A) and Husain wil be the leaders of the Youth of Paradise, and their father is better than them.* Grade: Hasan (Darussalam) Reference : Sunan Ibn Majah 118
